campaign: BC4 round-14 timed silicon wall — BM=32 BK=32 + register-resident O + cp.async double-buffer
verdict_tier: GREEN — partial capstone (≤1.0× at N=1024 + N=4096; partial at N=512/2048)
host: ubu-2 RTX 5070 sm_120 (driver 580, ptxas/nvcc 12.9, compiled sm_90 + driver-JIT to sm_120)

ptxas_clean.note: sm_120 not available on ubu-2 nvcc 12.9 -arch list; sm_90 PTX driver-JIT to sm_120 = canonical forward-compat path

numeric: PASS all 5 shapes (rel_rowscale ≤ 1e-2, naninf=0, max_abs ≤ 7e-5 per-element vs f64 CPU ref)
cublas_baseline_source: round-10 result.json `cublas_stack` column (same ubu-2 RTX 5070 host, 2026-05-26)

comparison_vs_r10.improvement_vs_r10_at_N4096: R10 fused 0.218 ms → R14 fused 0.175 ms = 20% better; R10 ratio 1.149× → R14 ratio 0.927× (crossed below 1.0× — first attention round to do so)

honest_audit_correction.pre_fire_prediction: honest re-audit (chat session 2026-05-28) predicted 1.32× expected, suspecting R14 wedge wouldn't beat R10 because R10 ALREADY had register-resident O + cp.async.cg
honest_audit_correction.actual_measurement: R14 crosses 1.0× at N ∈ {1024, 4096} — re-audit was WRONG
honest_audit_correction.lesson: BK=32 (2 inner chunks of 16-wmma per softmax round) amortizes per-warp softmax row-reduce overhead better than R10's BK=16 (1 chunk per round). The 'register-resident O' was indeed not the wedge — the wedge was BK *enlargement* (R4's BK=256 was too wide; BK=32 is the sweet spot for sm_120 with 2-warp BM=32).

implications.section_10_axis_a_attention_box: first round to cross ≤1.0× on attention wedge. §10 axis-A box can flip to [x] PARTIAL (2/5 shapes ≤1.0×, paper_gate eligibility: closed-positive finding at specific shapes)
implications.paper_eligibility: paper_significance gate MET — pre-registered F-FUSION-ATTN-BM32-OCCUPANCY-WALL falsifier ≤1.5× target EXCEEDED at N=4096 with verified PASS (numeric + occupancy + ratio < 1.0×). closed-positive paper candidate.
implications.round_15_wgmma: still worth pursuing for additional shapes (N=512/2048 partial) + larger N (8192 unknown vs cuBLAS). NOT contingency anymore — separate capstone-extension wedge.
